title: The Missing Exponential — Shuttle vs Falcon 9
description: Case Study: an exponential growth curve, last seen with the Shuttle program in 1985, has been located in someone else's program. Findings filed.

title: Long March 10B — Barge Catch on a Wire
description: Field Bulletin: China caught a falling Long March 10B booster on a barge. With a wire. This office has questions, and the appropriate forms.

title: The Shuttle Mass Mystery
description: Official Complaint, SOLVED: the Space Shuttle spent 30 years filing 90 tonnes of itself as 'payload.' Case closed, paperwork amended.

title: The Commons, and What Is Being Done to Them
description: Field Dispatch: a report on the orbital commons, and what is being done to them. Entered into the record. The record is not amused.

title: Bryce Tech vs GCAT — The Numbers Check Out
description: Forensic Audit: we cross-examined Bryce Tech's upmass figures against GCAT. Regrettably, they check out. Commendation and complaint filed in the same envelope.

title: The Linear Axis Atrocity
description: Official Complaint, OPEN: a bar chart with a linear axis so honest it should require a permit. The inset box is a monument to market share.

title: The "S" Prefix Affair
description: Official Complaint, WITHDRAWN: we cited the 'S' prefix as a crime against numeric purity. Then the Space Force invented Alpha-5. Crow eaten.
